title: Withholding of premium payments from wages
doc_html:
§5152.  Withholding of premium payments from wages

The said police juries and municipalities respectively may deduct from the employee's pay such parts of the premiums as are payable by the employee and as may be authorized in writing by the employee.

Acts 1950, No. 77, §2.
